title: alpine
html:
alpine

File Read

The file is displayed in the terminal interface. Other options might be available, for example, by pressing `S` is possible to save the file content elsewhere.

alpine -F /path/to/input-file
excerpt: alpine File Read The file is displayed in the terminal interface. Other options might be available, for example, by pressing `S` is possible to save the file content elsewhere. alpine -F /path/to/input-file
